Don't try to understand everything that happens along the way. God works in mysterious ways. If you’re trying to figure everything out, you’re going to get frustrated. There are things you’re not supposed to understand; that’s what faith is all about.

God’s ways are not our ways. He’s working when we can’t see it. Sometimes it’s taking longer because He has something better in store. One of the best things I’ve learned is to trust God’s timing and trust His ways.
